query:
SELECT 
  event_type,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM attendance_events
GROUP BY event_type;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT 
  event_type,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM attendance_events
GROUP BY event_type;
